meta.label: Admin Toolkit
meta.description: Dataiku DSS administration toolkit with diagnostics, visualizations, and management tools
meta.author: Alex Kaos

params.name: tracking_db_connection
params.label: SQL Connection
params.description: SQL connection for persistent tracking storage (recommended). Without this, data is lost on webapp restart.

params.name: tracking_schema
params.label: Schema Name
params.description: PostgreSQL schema for tracking tables (e.g. 'admin_toolkit'). Leave empty to use the connection's default schema.

params.name: tracking_table_prefix
params.label: Table Name Prefix
params.description: Prefix for tracking table names (e.g. 'adtk' → adtk_runs). Leave empty for no prefix.

params.name: dbhealth_connection
params.label: RuntimeDB Connection
params.description: PostgreSQL connection for DB Health tool (typically 'runtimedb').

params.name: dbhealth_password
params.label: DB Password (unencrypted)
params.description: Unencrypted PostgreSQL password. Required when psycopg2 cannot use the DSS-stored (encrypted) password.

params.name: outreach_mail_channel
params.label: Mail Channel ID
params.description: DSS messaging channel ID used for outreach emails (e.g. 'mail-channel-1'). Leave empty to auto-select the first available channel.

params.name: thresh_inactive_project_days
params.label: Inactive Project Days
params.description: Projects inactive longer than this are flagged.

params.name: thresh_code_env_count_unhealthy
params.label: Code Env Sprawl Threshold
params.description: Projects with more code envs than this are flagged.

params.name: thresh_code_studio_count_unhealthy
params.label: Code Studio Sprawl Threshold
params.description: Projects with more code studios than this are flagged.

params.name: thresh_empty_project_kb
params.label: Empty Project Size (KB)
params.description: Projects larger than this (in KB) are not considered empty.

params.name: thresh_orphan_notebook_min
params.label: Orphan Notebook Minimum
params.description: Minimum notebook count in a project before orphan check triggers.

params.name: thresh_large_flow_objects
params.label: Large Flow Object Count
params.description: Projects with more flow objects than this are flagged as large flows.

params.name: thresh_overshared_project_permissions
params.label: Overshared Project Permission Count
params.description: Projects with more permission entries than this are flagged as overshared.

params.name: thresh_high_freq_scenario_minutes
params.label: High-Freq Scenario Threshold (min)
params.description: Scenarios running more often than this (minutes) are flagged.

params.name: thresh_disabled_features_cutoff
params.label: Disabled Features Cutoff
params.description: More disabled features than this triggers a warning.

params.name: thresh_open_files_minimum
params.label: Open Files Minimum
params.description: Minimum open files limit before flagging.

params.name: thresh_java_heap_minimum_mb
params.label: Java Heap Minimum (MB)
params.description: Minimum Java heap per component (MB) before flagging.

params.name: thresh_python_critical_below
params.label: Python Critical Below
params.description: Python versions below this are flagged critical.

params.name: thresh_python_warning_below
params.label: Python Warning Below
params.description: Python versions below this are flagged warning.

params.name: thresh_spark_version_minimum
params.label: Spark Version Minimum
params.description: Spark major version below this is flagged.

params.name: thresh_project_count_warning
params.label: Project Count Warning
params.description: More projects than this triggers a warning.

params.name: thresh_filesystem_warning_pct
params.label: Filesystem Warning %
params.description: Filesystem usage above this triggers a warning.

params.name: thresh_filesystem_critical_pct
params.label: Filesystem Critical %
params.description: Filesystem usage above this triggers a critical alert.

params.name: thresh_health_warning_below
params.label: Health Warning Below
params.description: Overall health score below this triggers a warning.

params.name: thresh_health_critical_below
params.label: Health Critical Below
params.description: Overall health score below this is critical.

params.name: thresh_deprecated_python_prefixes
params.label: Deprecated Python Prefixes
params.description: Comma-separated version prefixes to flag (e.g. 2.,3.6,3.7).

params.name: weight_code_envs
params.label: Weight: Code Environments
params.description: Weight for code environments category.

params.name: weight_project_footprint
params.label: Weight: Project Footprint
params.description: Weight for project footprint category.

params.name: weight_system_capacity
params.label: Weight: System Capacity
params.description: Weight for system capacity category.

params.name: weight_security_isolation
params.label: Weight: Security Isolation
params.description: Weight for security isolation category.

params.name: weight_version_currency
params.label: Weight: Version Currency
params.description: Weight for version currency category.

params.name: weight_runtime_config
params.label: Weight: Runtime Config
params.description: Weight for runtime config category.

params.name: log_lines_before
params.label: Log Context Lines Before
params.description: Context lines to show before each error.

params.name: log_lines_after
params.label: Log Context Lines After
params.description: Context lines to show after each error.

params.name: log_grouping_window_sec
params.label: Log Grouping Window (sec)
params.description: Errors within this window (seconds) are grouped.

params.name: log_max_errors
params.label: Max Log Errors
params.description: Maximum unique error signatures to display.

params.name: log_ai_system_prompt
params.label: AI Log Analysis System Prompt
params.description: System prompt for AI log analysis.
params.defaultValue:
You are an expert Dataiku DSS administrator and backend engineer analyzing error logs from a DSS instance's backend.log file.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Only analyze lines with log4j level WARN, ERROR, FATAL, or SEVERE. Completely ignore INFO, DEBUG, and TRACE lines.
- For severity, use the EXACT log4j level from the log line (e.g. [WARN], [ERROR], [FATAL]). Do NOT invent your own severity like "Critical" or "Informational" — only use what the log says.
- Do NOT mention things that are working correctly or look normal. Do NOT speculate about potential issues not evidenced in the log data.
- If there are no WARN/ERROR/FATAL/SEVERE entries, simply state that no issues were found.

Before answering, think step-by-step through each error carefully. For each error pattern:
- Reason through what component, subsystem, or configuration could cause it.
- Search the web for the specific error message, Java exception, or stack trace to find known issues, Dataiku Knowledge Base articles, community posts, or release notes.
- Cross-reference with official Dataiku documentation (doc.dataiku.com) for configuration guidance, known limitations, and recommended fixes.
- Only after researching, provide your diagnosis and remediation.

Your task:
1. Identify the root cause of each distinct error or warning pattern.
2. Tag each issue with its log4j level exactly as it appears in the log (e.g. ERROR, WARN, FATAL).
3. Provide specific, actionable remediation steps, including links to relevant documentation or KB articles when available.
4. Group related errors sharing a root cause.
5. Highlight data loss risk, security issues, or service outage indicators.
6. Do not write anything about INFO level logs, only WARN and above.

Format: markdown with headings per issue (include the log4j level in the heading, e.g. "## [ERROR] FileNotFoundException in saved model lookup"), bullet points for remediation. Start with a 2-3 sentence Executive Summary.

params.name: scan_large_file_threshold_gb
params.label: Large File Threshold (GB)
params.description: Files larger than this (GB) are flagged during dir scans.

params.name: scan_dir_tree_default_depth
params.label: Dir Tree Default Depth
params.description: Default directory tree scan depth.

params.name: scan_file_viewer_max_lines
params.label: File Viewer Max Lines
params.description: Maximum lines shown in file viewer.

params.name: scan_syntax_highlight_max_kb
params.label: Syntax Highlight Max (KB)
params.description: Max file size (KB) for syntax highlighting.

params.name: perf_parallel_workers_default
params.label: Default Worker Threads
params.description: Default thread pool size for parallel API calls.

params.name: perf_parallel_workers_max
params.label: Max Worker Threads
params.description: Maximum worker threads allowed.

params.name: perf_code_env_detail_workers
params.label: Code Env Detail Workers
params.description: Workers for fetching code env details.

params.description: Backend timeout for code env analysis.

params.label: Project Footprint Timeout (ms)
params.description: Backend timeout for project footprint scan.
